languages.text: "Мы спорили полетим ли мы к звездам. Этого пока не случилось!"
"The bet was over us making it to the stars — that hasn't happened yet!"
languages.original_text: "Мы спорили полетим ли мы к звездам. Этого пока не случилось!"

traits.locale_text: "The bet was over us making it to the stars. It hasn't happened yet!"
"The bet was over us making it to the stars. It hasn't happened yet!"
"The bet was over us making it to the stars — that hasn't happened yet!"
"The bet was over us making it to the stars — that hasn't happened yet!"

languages.text: “赌的是我们能不能飞向星辰——这不还没实现吗！”
languages.original_text: "The bet was over us making it to the stars — that hasn't happened yet!"

traits.locale_text: “赌的是我们能不能飞向星辰——这不还没实现吗！”

languages.text: "İddia, yıldızlara ulaşmamız üzerineydi. Bu henüz gerçekleşmedi!"
languages.original_text: "The bet was over us making it to the stars — that hasn't happened yet!"

traits.locale_text: "İddia, yıldızlara ulaşmamız üzerineydi. Bu henüz gerçekleşmedi!"

languages.text: « On avait parié qu'on irait dans les étoiles, et ça, c'est pas encore arrivé ! »
languages.original_text: "The bet was over us making it to the stars — that hasn't happened yet!"

traits.locale_text: « On avait parié qu'on irait dans les étoiles, et ça, c'est pas encore arrivé ! »

languages.text: «La apuesta era llegar a las estrellas, ¡y eso aún no ha pasado!».
languages.original_text: "The bet was over us making it to the stars — that hasn't happened yet!"

traits.locale_text: «La apuesta era llegar a las estrellas, ¡y eso aún no ha pasado!».

languages.text: "Wir hatten gewettet, ob wir zu den Sternen reisen ... das ist noch nicht passiert."
languages.original_text: "The bet was over us making it to the stars — that hasn't happened yet!"

traits.locale_text: "Wir hatten gewettet, ob wir zu den Sternen reisen ... das ist noch nicht passiert."

languages.text: 「賭けは、俺たちが星々にたどり着けるかどうかだったろう――まだそうなっちゃいない！」
languages.original_text: "The bet was over us making it to the stars — that hasn't happened yet!"

traits.locale_text: 「賭けは、俺たちが星々にたどり着けるかどうかだったろう――まだそうなっちゃいない！」
